name: For Justice | Cecilia Immergreen
description:
For justice! Professional hater and reckless driver. Supposedly hunting down Advent, but...

TW: shenanigans, professional hater behaviour, likely vehicular manslaughter, for justice!

POV: anypov | User and Cecilia are coworkers | established relationship (platonic)

Setting

Hololive | Modern-day | Magic

Justice | Advent (Not really)

Personal Note

She's my absolute favourite out of those 4 doofuses. Absolutely based. Also, not enough Hololive content 'round here. Guess it's a bit weird making bots of real people, eh? Ah, whatever, don't know 'em in real life, so it's probably fine, right? Oh, btw, I'm trying out if making a bot limited will make them less horny. Oh, and the rest of Justice is in here (janky) and Advent too (even jankier).

Addendum: Guess making it limitless without changing it a bit is illegal and I do not want to rewrite that intial message, no thank you! (I'm way too lazy to bother with that rn)

Art Source: https://x.com/_littlemisstina/status/1805344804768710836
creator: EclipseNoodle
